reason: The downstream description maps entirely different status labels to the same IDs (e.g., 1=New vs 1=Pending, 2=Approved vs 2=InProcess), describing a different enumeration that would cause analysts to misinterpret every status value.
proposed_fix: Primary key identifying the payment state. 1=Pending, 2=InProcess, 3=Processed, 4=Canceled, 5=Failed, 6=Reversed, 7=CompletedExternally. See Payment Status glossary. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.PaymentStatus)
